pages.raw_text:
It is announced today that an
other session with the city council
will be asked by the board of public
works in an attempt to reconcile its
own action on the Howard street
bridge with that taken Tuesday
night when the council ordered the
Washington Water Power company
to reconstruct the bridge without
cost to the city.


Previous to this action the board
had fixed up a deal whereby the
Getty and the company should share
the expense of reconstruction
equally.


IN this the board claims to have
had the councils sanction express
ed In committee of the whole.


Probably they did then, but the
council seems to have seriously re-
considered the bridge question
since the public got really inter
ested in it.


1t is stated, however, that the
repair work will be carried right
through and the board apparently
hopes to have it's benevolent deal
to save the company the full por-
ton of expenditure 1t has made
necessary and can be held to make
good.
